emails.subject: Re: any good news today?
emails.body: Re: any good news today? Nothing but good news everyday. Not sure I mentioned this: kerrigan's now running non-reg finance side at txu in dallas. We started talking about possibility of txu resetting eastern contract and writing us a big check (discount for early pay to be negotiated based on size). No word yet from legal on rolling el paso ecp swaps back into ena and arguing setoff rights to get our collateral back we are posting el paso. Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: RE: any good news today?
emails.body: RE: any good news today? is Lisa doing ok on the LC wrap? To: Kitchen, Louise

emails.subject: RE: any good news today?
emails.body: RE: any good news today? I've been in with kaminski and bowen all morning so I have limited feedback today. I heard we had prelim good feedback from cadwalader on pledging contracts. Issue on post bankruptcy price risk issue remains. Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>
